message:
fix(vc_collect): add boolish and stringified-tags deserializers for Machine rows

SQLite stores booleans as integers (0/1) and tags as JSON-encoded
strings rather than native arrays.  When Machine structs are
deserialized from SQLite query results, serde fails on these type
mismatches.  This adds custom deserialize_boolish (for is_local and
enabled) and deserialize_tags helpers that accept integers, strings,
JSON-encoded arrays, and null -- making Machine deserialization robust
against both config files and raw SQLite rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
